title: Senior Software Engineer - Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
